creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a major version update to a library with many dependencies, direct and indirect. This need to be tested in the xorg dev repo for some time before it is pushed to the regular ports repo, especially since it contains shlib version bumps.
 Does it solve any  specific issues or is it updates just for the sake of updates?
 -- 
 Niclas
 Sent from my mobile device.
 Excuse my brevity.
